title: Podman Desktop (Windows) - unable to add setup path for images
body:
### Issue Description

When installing and setting up Podman Desktop for the first time, one can specify a path where Podman will place pulled images. However, it's not possible to actually specify the path: the input field is locked for editing, and the dialog-window only accepts selecting a file, not a directory.

![image](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/1468788/5d064350-2232-48cd-8b76-5f499b7db660)

This for version 1.5.3 of Podman Desktop for Windows.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Install Podman Desktop on Windows
2. Go through setup and press 'Browse' to add a path where images should be placed
3. Be unable to select a directory, as the browse-dialog only accepts selecting a file.

comments.body: Podman Desktop issues should be reported against: https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop
